description: Optional registry of MCP servers and CLI tools the agent may use. Extend as you wire more.

mcps.purpose: Headless/IDE browser: navigate, snapshot, QA flows
mcps.notes: Always read server INSTRUCTIONS; snapshot after navigation.

mcps.purpose: Create project dirs + git init; move agent workspace root

cli.purpose: Export YouTube top comments (yt-dlp) to JSON/CSV/MD; agent entry `tools/youtube-top-comments/AGENTS.md`
